rulings.Case Title: VISHAL GROVER VS. WILLIAM CAMPBELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 16, 2015 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT DAVID BELLINGS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to July 16, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the operative cross-complaint and reply to department 501 no later than June 26, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CINDY ZHANG VS. GEORGE JEFFRIES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 16, 2015 line 7. DEFENDANT ADINA PERNELL's Motion To Compel Discovery GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to compel discovery responses and deem admissions admitted is GRANTED. Plaintiff is to provide verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Request for Production no later than June 17, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. by hand delivery. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $60. Request to continue trial is DENIED. Defendant failed to address lack of discovery responses since March 20, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERRENCE JUNN VS. TIFFANY RAPIER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Responses To 1) Form Interrogatories; 2) Request For Production Of Documents, 3) Request For Admissioins, And 4) For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 16, 2015 line 12. rulings.Case Title: HOI YUEN CHOW ET AL VS. NU MAC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 16, 2015 line 13. DEFENDANTS NU MAC, CAU QUAN QUAN, AHN LOAN NGUYEN, QUE BINH QUAN, PHI BINH QUAN, VINH TAN QUAN, CAU MAN QUAN and WENDY DANG's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED. The sole owner of the Property is the Revocable Trust dated August 24, 1994 (RJN Ex. A). "Hoi Yeun Chow" and "Kuan Wa Kou Chow" are the trustees of the Trust. Notice of Intent to Withdraw is to be signed by the owners of the Property. "Hoi Yeun Chow" and "Kuan Wa Kou Chow" signed and their identification as "trustees" is not necessary under the circumstances, being a surplusage. = (501/REQ)
